mapper.insert: insert into nx_customer_promotion_code_attempt (invitee_user_id, promotion_code_id, promotion_code_snapshot, source_owner_type, source_owner_id, invalid_reason, commerce_id, community_id, share_entry, attempted_at) values (#{inviteeUserId}, #{promotionCodeId}, #{promotionCodeSnapshot}, #{sourceOwnerType}, #{sourceOwnerId}, #{invalidReason}, #{commerceId}, #{communityId}, #{shareEntry}, #{attemptedAt})
